leadText: The Roto Stealth (Japanese: かくれポン Roto Stealth) is a Rotom Power introduced in Pokémon Ultra Sun and Ultra Moon.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] Bag item [ edit | edit source ]

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Bag item [ edit | edit source ] Games Description US UM P E Sw Sh BD SP LA One of the Rotom Powers. It prevents you from encountering wild Pokémon for a certain period of time. S V ZA One of the Rotom Powers. When used, it prevents you from encountering any wild Pokémon for a certain period of time.
